channel.title: Blog — Pratyush Chauhan
channel.description: Notes on systems, AI, and building things.

item.title: How Hermes Formats Telegram Messages So Well
item.description: A deep case study on how Hermes Agent converts Markdown to native Telegram formatting — tables, code blocks, bold, italic, and more.

item.title: Now More Than Ever, Why Do We Need Deterministic Solutions?
item.description: Why deterministic computing matters more than ever in the age of generative AI. If we lose predictability, we lose the foundation reliable systems are built on.
